---
title: "O Canada!"
description: "The WISSPAR team shared the platform at ISPPD-12 in Toronto."
author: "The WISSPAR Team"
date: "2022-06-22"
categories: [updates]
image: images/logo-new.png
image-alt: "WISSPAR pneumococcus mascot logo"
---

The WISSPAR team attended the **12th International Symposium on Pneumococci and
Pneumococcal Disease (ISPPD-12)** in Toronto. We were thrilled to share our
platform with a fantastic group of pneumococcal researchers and pneumococcal
vaccine enthusiasts this week, whether in a flash talk or in a group meeting.

Our goal was to demonstrate what WISSPAR can do and to gather your input for
improvements — because we want to make all of your pneumococcal immunogenicity
data dreams come true!

## Our e-poster

<div class="ratio ratio-16x9" style="max-width:900px;margin:1rem 0;">
  <iframe src="ISPPD_WISSPAR_E_POSTER.pdf"
          title="WISSPAR ISPPD-12 e-poster"></iframe>
</div>

[Download the e-poster (PDF)](ISPPD_WISSPAR_E_POSTER.pdf)
